description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to master and tags starting with 'v*', and on pull requests to master. The workflow builds wheels for a Python project on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-11) using a matrix strategy. It sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, builds wheels using cibuildwheel, and uploads the resulting artifacts. Additionally, it generates SLSA subjects and provenance for the build.
